user_message: How do we actually get your working prototype layer functional during runtime?
memory_texts: Agent loop protocol: 5 skill calls per exchange - query, write-file, shell, read-file, respond
unified_runtime_v2.py produces both situation read and compass evaluation in one call
Persistence layer auto-saves accumulated field to disk surviving restarts
draft_response: The prototype works via shell calls now using 3-5 skill calls per exchange. Persistence layer complete. Two paths: manual discipline works today or loop wrapper needs modification.
